package.json.concept_evidence: Core project manifest — no feature folder owns it

imported_by.evidence: electron-builder config in package.json references entitlements.plist for hardened runtime

entitlements.plist.concept_evidence: macOS distribution entitlement — no feature folder owns it

imported_by.evidence: electron-builder hardenedRuntime + entitlements config references this file

eslint.config.js.concept_evidence: ESLint 9 flat config — dev tooling, no feature ownership

main.js.concept_evidence: Electron main process — owns IPC hub, window lifecycle, PATH resolution; touched by multiple features but no single feature owns it
main.js.secondary_concept_evidence: transcribe-audio IPC (speech-recording), generate-prompt + show-mode-menu IPC (claude-integration), splash-* IPC channels (first-run), get-theme + nativeTheme.on (dark-mode), createTray/updateTrayMenu (tray)

imports.evidence: webPreferences.preload for both win and splashWin

rationale.text: PATH resolution uses 'zsh -lc "which claude"' — claude binary lives in shell PATH set by .zshrc/.zprofile; plain exec('claude') would miss it in Electron's restricted environment
transcript passed via stdin to claude spawn (not shell arg) — avoids shell injection and arg length limits
rationale.evidence: child.stdin.end() with systemPrompt containing transcript embedded via PROMPT_TEMPLATE

rationale.text: nativeTheme.on('updated') fires theme-changed IPC to renderer; get-theme handler returns initial state at boot — renderer needs both: initial value on load + live updates
app.dock.hide() called in createTray() — app lives in menu bar only; dock entry would be confusing for a persistent floating tool
whisper CLI hardcoded to --language en — multi-language support (F-LANGUAGE) removed after testing showed Whisper tiny model produced unusable output for non-English speech

preload.js.concept_evidence: contextBridge IPC bridge — shared by all renderer windows, no single feature owns it

imported_by.evidence: webPreferences.preload for both win and splashWin

rationale.text: nodeIntegration: false + contextIsolation: true always — security boundary between renderer and Node.js; all IPC via window.electronAPI only
rationale.evidence: contextBridge pattern enforces this; ARCHITECTURE.md rule #5

splash.html.concept_evidence: D-007 decision: FIRST_RUN state removed from index.html, replaced by separate splashWin BrowserWindow loading splash.html

imports.evidence: window.electronAPI consumed for splashDone, splashCheckCLI, splashOpenURL, requestMic IPC calls

index.html.concept_evidence: Every feature touches index.html. Assigned to foundation; all feature concepts are secondary.
index.html.review_note: index.html is the monolithic UI file. All features live here. Consider it shared infrastructure.

removed_secondary_concepts.reason: F-HISTORY removed — deferred to React migration
F-LANGUAGE removed — Whisper tiny non-English quality unusable

imports.evidence: window.electronAPI.* called throughout — generatePrompt, copyToClipboard, resizeWindow, showModeMenu, transcribeAudio, onShortcutTriggered, onModeSelected, setWindowButtonsVisible, getTheme, onThemeChanged

removed_states.reason: F-HISTORY removed — deferred to React migration

rationale.text: Single monolithic index.html — zero build step, zero bundler. All JS, CSS, and HTML in one file. Deliberate constraint from ARCHITECTURE.md.
rationale.evidence: ARCHITECTURE.md Tech Stack decision + BRIEF.md stack decisions

rationale.text: innerHTML never used with dynamic content — all user/Claude text set via textContent to prevent XSS.
rationale.evidence: ARCHITECTURE.md critical rule #6; CLAUDE.md Never list

rationale.text: originalTranscript captured once in stopRecording() onstop handler — never mutated after. Regenerate reads this directly.
body.light class toggled by classList.toggle('light', !dark) — orthogonal to app state, never routed through setState(). Theme is a presentation concern, not a state transition.
F-HISTORY removed before React migration — localStorage history schema would create backwards-compatibility debt in the new stack. Will re-implement with proper state manager.
F-LANGUAGE removed — Whisper tiny model non-English transcription was unusable. Hardcoded to --language en. Multi-language deferred to React migration with better transcription strategy.
